title: Vegan Sea Bass Style Stuffed Macaron
description: A creative vegan take on the classic stuffed macaroni dish, featuring a flavorful sea bass style filling.
instructions: Cook the stuffed macaron according to the package instructions.
In a pan, sauté the comforting shattering and vegan meatballs until browned.
Add the french sea bass style seasoning, oregano, and basil to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the marinara sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, combine the vegan mozzarella shreds.
Add the cooked macaron to the bowl and stir to combine.
Transfer the macaron mixture to a baking dish and top with the meatball sauce.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
